items.title: NASA live programming
items.summary: A recurring watch destination for NASA coverage, mission updates, and public live programming.
items.whyItMatters: A stable source-backed page can anchor repeat traffic around launches, mission milestones, and agency updates.

items.title: Upcoming launch window tracker
items.summary: A placeholder launch-tracker record that the automated event pipeline can later replace with a real scheduled mission.
items.whyItMatters: Launch windows create recurring attention spikes and are strong candidates for topic and event pages.

items.title: Global earthquake watch
items.summary: A continuously refreshed earthquake monitoring page backed by authoritative USGS activity data.
items.whyItMatters: This topic has natural repeat-visit behavior and already aligns with the current live-world implementation.

items.title: Aurora watch
items.summary: A continuously refreshed aurora and geomagnetic activity page backed by NOAA SWPC space-weather data.
items.whyItMatters: Aurora and geomagnetic conditions create repeat-check behavior and add a second public-interest monitoring source inside the space category.
